title: Göbekli Tepe
summary: One of the oldest known monumental ritual sites, challenging assumptions about early civilization.

title: Sumer
summary: One of the earliest urban civilizations, associated with writing, kingship, temples, and flood traditions.

title: Ancient Egypt
summary: A major ancient civilization centered on divine kingship, temple ritual, afterlife beliefs, and sacred symbolism.

title: Genesis
summary: The biblical book of beginnings, including creation, Eden, the flood, patriarchs, and covenant themes.

title: Book of Enoch
summary: An ancient Jewish apocalyptic text expanding on watchers, heavenly journeys, judgment, and cosmic order.

title: Dead Sea Scrolls
summary: A collection of Jewish manuscripts that preserve biblical texts, sectarian writings, and apocalyptic traditions.

title: Nag Hammadi Library
summary: A collection of early Christian and Gnostic writings discovered in Egypt.

title: Pistis Sophia
summary: A Gnostic Christian text featuring post-resurrection teachings of Jesus, with Mary Magdalene playing a major role.
